Title: GPIO register write/read validation
Description: Validates default reset values and masked write/read behavior for a defined list of 49 GPIO-related registers.
Preconditions: Includes <gpio/gpio_def.h> and <gpio/gpio_offset.h>; requires test harness providing read_reg, write_reg, wait_on, finish; device registers assumed at reset defaults.
TestSteps: 1) test_case() called; 2) chk_rst_val(): iterate i=0..48: addr=addr_array[i]; if skip_rst_array[i]==1 or read_mask_array[i]==0x0 then continue; data_rd=read_reg(addr); data=(data_rd & 0xFFFFFFFE); compare to default_value_array[i]; if mismatch then def_fail_cnt++; 3) chk_rd_wr(): for each pattern in [0xFFFFFFFF,0xAAAAAAAA,0x55555555,0xF5F5F5F5,0xA5A5A5A5,0xFFFF0000]: set data_wr; write phase i=0..48: if skip_array[i]==1 or write_mask_array[i]==0x0 then continue; write_reg(addr_array[i], (data_wr & write_mask_array[i])); read/compare phase i=0..48: if skip_array[i]==1 or write_mask_array[i]==0x0 or read_mask_array[i]==0x0 then continue; data_rd=(read_reg(addr)&read_mask_array[i]); wr_n=(write_mask_array[i]^0xFFFFFFFF); exp_val=((data_wr & read_mask_array[i] & write_mask_array[i]) | (wr_n & read_mask_array[i] & default_value_array[i])); if data_rd!=exp_val then wr_fail_cnt++; 4) if (def_fail_cnt>0 || wr_fail_cnt>0) finish(1) else finish(0).
ExpectedResults: Pass if def_fail_cnt==0 and wr_fail_cnt==0, resulting in finish(0); otherwise finish(1).
PassCriteria: finish(0) with both counters zero (def_fail_cnt==0 and wr_fail_cnt==0).
Notes: VRRW registers are skipped per skip_array; default-value read masks off bit0; note in source: DIN may read as 1 if not forced, affecting expected default reads.

Title: GPIO negedge interrupt enable and service (pads 8-39)
Description: Configures per-pin registers and group interrupt enable, stimulates pad transitions via writes to 0xA0243FFC, services Default_IRQHandler to validate per-pin raw clear, group status clear, and LSS sysreg RAW_STCR1 clear.
Preconditions: Conditional build-time macros GPIO0/GPIO1 select IRQ lines and sysreg bits; requires GIC, read_reg/write_reg/wait_on/finish APIs; external stimulus register at 0xA0243FFC accessible.
TestSteps: 1) test_case(): test_err=0; optionally GIC_EnableIRQ(87/88) per GPIO0/GPIO1; enable MIZAR_LSS_SYSREG_INTR_EN1 bit for GPIO0/1; write_reg(0xA0243FFC,0xFFFFFFFF); for i=0..31: addr1=MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_GPIO_8+(i*4); write_reg(addr1,(1<<20)|(1<<18)|(1<<16)); wait_on(10); then loop i=0..31: wr_val=(1<<i); write_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GPIO_INTR_RAW_STCLR1,wr_val); write_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_EN1,wr_val); wait_on(10); int_pend=1; write_reg(0xA0243FFC,0xFFFFFFFF); wait_on(30); write_reg(0xA0243FFC,~wr_val); timeout=5000; while(int_pend && timeout--) wait_on(10); if timeout==0 then printf error and test_err++; after loop finish(test_err). 2) Default_IRQHandler(): local_wr=(1<<i); int_pend=0; write_reg(0xA0243FFC,0xFFFFFFFF); raddr=MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_GPIO_8+(i*4); rdata=read_reg(raddr); if ((rdata&0x1)!=0) test_err++; if ((rdata&0x2)!=0x0) then rdata_grp=read_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_STS1); if ((rdata_grp & local_wr)==0) test_err++; write_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_GPIO_8+(i*4),(1<<20)|(1<<16)); write_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GPIO_INTR_RAW_STCLR1,local_wr); rdata_grp=read_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_STS1); if (rdata_grp!=0x0) test_err++; per GPIO0: write_reg(MIZAR_LSS_SYSREG_RAW_STCR1,LSS_SYSREG_RAW_STCR1_GPIO0_INTR); GIC_ClearIRQ(87); per GPIO1: write_reg(MIZAR_LSS_SYSREG_RAW_STCR1,LSS_SYSREG_RAW_STCR1_GPIO1_INTR); GIC_ClearIRQ(88); else (no (rdata&0x2)) test_err++.
ExpectedResults: No timeout while waiting for ISR (int_pend cleared before timeout); in ISR: (rdata&0x1)==0 and (rdata&0x2)!=0; group status bit for current pin set before clear and 0 after clear; LSS sysreg RAW_STCR1 bit cleared; finish(test_err) with test_err==0.
Parameters: i iterates 0..31 (pads 8..39 implied by address base); wr_val=(1<<i); timeout=5000; per-pin write values: (1<<20)|(1<<18)|(1<<16); external drive patterns: 0xFFFFFFFF and bitwise ~wr_val to 0xA0243FFC.
PassCriteria: All checks pass in ISR and no timeouts; finish(test_err) called with 0.
Notes: Uses hard-coded external register 0xA0243FFC for stimulation (function not defined here); behavior depends on GPIO0/GPIO1 macros; limited error handling (timeouts increment counter only).

Title: GPIO posedge interrupt enable and service (pads 8-39)
Description: Enables positive-edge interrupts per pin, configures IO control groups, stimulates edges via 0xA0243FFC, and validates group status, per-pin raw clear, and LSS sysreg RAW_STCR1 clear in Default_IRQHandler.
Preconditions: Conditional macros GPIO0/GPIO1 select IRQ lines and sysreg bits; requires GIC and read_reg/write_reg/wait_on/finish APIs; external stimulus register at 0xA0243FFC accessible.
TestSteps: 1) test_case(): optionally GIC_EnableIRQ(87/88) per GPIO0/GPIO1; enable MIZAR_LSS_SYSREG_INTR_EN1 bit for GPIO0/1; for i=0..31: write_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_GPIO_8+(i*4),0x00020000); wait_on(10); write_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GPIO_IO_CTRL_GROUP1,0x000000FF); GROUP2=0x000000FF; GROUP3=0x000000FF; GROUP4=0x000000FF; wait_on(10); write_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_EN1,0xFFFFFFFF); for i=0..31: write_reg(0xA0243FFC,0x00000000); wait_on(10); int_pend=1; write_reg(0xA0243FFC,0xFFFFFFFF); timeout=2000; while(int_pend==1 && --timeout>0) wait_on(10); if timeout==0 then printf error, test_err++, break; write_reg(0xA0243FFC,0x00000000); wait_on(10); finish(test_err). 2) Default_IRQHandler(): wr_val=(1<<i); int_pend=0; rdata_grp=read_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_STS1); write_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_EN1,0x00000000); if ((rdata_grp & 0xFFFFFFFF)!=0) success else printf error and test_err++; for j=0..31: write_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_GPIO_8+(j*4),0x00010000); wait_on(2); rdata_grp=read_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_STS1); if (rdata_grp!=0x0) printf error and test_err++; per GPIO0: write_reg(MIZAR_LSS_SYSREG_RAW_STCR1,LSS_SYSREG_RAW_STCR1_GPIO0_INTR); verify cleared; per GPIO1: write_reg(MIZAR_LSS_SYSREG_RAW_STCR1,LSS_SYSREG_RAW_STCR1_GPIO1_INTR); verify cleared; write_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_EN1,0xFFFFFFFF); GIC_ClearIRQ(87/88 as defined).
ExpectedResults: No timeout while waiting for ISR; in ISR: group interrupt status non-zero before per-pin clear, becomes 0 after clear; LSS sysreg RAW_STCR1 bit cleared for active GPIOx; finish(test_err) with 0.
Parameters: i iterates 0..31; timeout=2000; per-pin config 0x00020000 (posedge per comment); IO_CTRL_GROUPx=0x000000FF; ISR per-pin raw clear value 0x00010000; external drive toggles 0xA0243FFC between 0x00000000 and 0xFFFFFFFF.
PassCriteria: All checks pass and no timeouts; finish(test_err) called with 0.
Notes: Relies on external register 0xA0243FFC for edge generation; behavior gated by GPIO0/GPIO1 macros; limited error handling beyond timeouts and counter increments.}
